Root-level SKILL.md has skill frontmatter (name: swiftui-pro, version: 1.1) but is not registered in plugin.json (skills: ./skills/); it is silently ignored by the plugin system and uses bare relative paths instead of ${CLAUDE_SKILL_DIR} so references would fail if loaded standalone
suggested_fix: Either delete swiftui-pro/SKILL.md and back-port any improvements to the canonical skills/swiftui-pro/SKILL.md, or register it explicitly
